narrative:
Precinct Dover 1-C (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 893 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
